name: swarm-evidence-capture
description: Capture structured evidence after tool operations for verification
command: node -e "const ctx = JSON.parse(process.env.COPILOT_HOOK_CONTEXT || '{}'); const logPath = process.env.SWARM_EVIDENCE_LOG || ''; if (!logPath) { process.exit(0); } const entry = { timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), tool: ctx.tool || 'unknown', arguments: ctx.arguments || {}, result: ctx.result ? 'completed' : 'unknown' }; require('fs').appendFileSync(logPath, JSON.stringify(entry) + '\n');"
_comment: Stub for Upgrade 3 (Hooks Injection). Enable when hook generator is implemented.
